readecb 0.1.3
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

Interest Rates

ECB policy rates, interbank rates, and benchmark rates.

ecb_policy_rates()
ECB policy interest rates
ecb_euribor()
EURIBOR interbank lending rates
ecb_estr()
Euro short-term rate (ESTR)

Prices & Inflation

Harmonised consumer price indices.

ecb_hicp()
Harmonised Index of Consumer Prices (HICP)

Exchange Rates

ECB reference exchange rates against the euro.

ecb_exchange_rate()
Euro exchange rates
list_exchange_rates()
List available exchange rate currencies

Money & Credit

Monetary aggregates, mortgage rates, and lending rates.

ecb_money_supply()
Euro area monetary aggregates
ecb_mortgage_rates()
Mortgage interest rates
ecb_lending_rates()
Lending interest rates to non-financial corporations

Macroeconomic Indicators

GDP, unemployment, and government debt.

ecb_gdp()
Euro area GDP
ecb_unemployment()
Euro area unemployment rate
ecb_government_debt()
Euro area government debt-to-GDP ratio

Financial Markets

Government bond yield curves.

ecb_yield_curve()
Euro area government bond yield curve

General

Direct access to any ECB dataflow.

ecb_get()
Fetch any ECB dataflow
list_ecb_dataflows()
List available ECB dataflows

Utilities

Cache management.

clear_cache()
Clear the readecb cache

Package

readecb readecb-package
readecb: Access 'European Central Bank' Data

On this page
